delete.title: Deactivate account
delete.message: Your account and listings will be hidden. You can reactivate by signing in again. Continue?

reactivate.title: Account deactivated
reactivate.message: Your account is currently deactivated. Reactivate it to continue, or sign out.

errors.nameRequired: Please enter your first and last name
errors.ageTooYoung: You must be at least {{min}} years old
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't deactivate your account. Please try again.
